description_long: This cushion features a square shape with a visually striking floral tile pattern on its top surface, consisting of four stylized flowers in warm tones of brown, gold, and cream, accented with green centers. The pattern is divided into quadrants, each bordered by a thin line, giving the appearance of four tiles set within the cushion. The sides of the cushion are plain and relatively thin, suggesting a low-profile design. The edges show slight wear, with some discoloration and minor scuffing visible, indicating it has been used. The surface appears to be made of a smooth, possibly vinyl or coated fabric material, with a firm but slightly yielding structure. This cushion would likely be used for decorative or seating purposes in an outdoor or semi-outdoor urban setting, such as a public bench or patio.
description: A square cushion with a bold floral tile pattern in brown, gold, and cream, featuring four stylized flowers and slightly worn edges. The surface is smooth and the cushion is low-profile, likely used for seating or decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full floral tile pattern with four distinct flower motifs and clean, defined edges.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cushion's thin profile and plain, lightly worn edge.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same floral tile pattern but with more visible edge wear and slight discoloration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and some scuff marks along the edge.
attribute_location: public park bench or outdoor café seating
attribute_placement: placed flat on a bench or seat for added comfort and decoration
